analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet quotes Sergey Lavrov claiming that Latvia and Estonia discriminate against Russian-speaking populations, highlighting statelessness and deprivation of basic democratic rights. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) — Applicable. The tweet portrays Western-aligned countries (Latvia and Estonia, EU/NATO members) as discriminatory and violating democratic rights, casting Russian-speakers as victims of Western allies' immoral behavior. RU2 — Not applicable; no mention of alternative systems or multilateralism. RU3 — Not applicable; no portrayal of Russia as a benevolent partner or mediator. RU4 — Not applicable; no reference to history or historical achievements. RU5 — Not applicable; no claim of Russian forefront successes. RU6 — Not applicable; no cultural or tourism content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
